concept_hierarchy_links.justification: PortCity is a more specific type of geographic area, as it is a city that includes port facilities. GeographicArea is a general class for any region or area on Earth that can be identified or described, so PortCity naturally fits as a subclass.

relation_hierarchy_links.justification: The relation "locatedIn" specifies a spatial containment of an entity within a geographic or administrative location, which is a particular instance of an entity being part of another entity.  Thus, "locatedIn" is a more specific, spatial subrelation of the broader structural relation "partOf".

evidence.snippet: Skai TV is a Greek free - to - air television network based in Piraeus . It is part of the Skai Group , one of the largest media groups in the country

relation_hierarchy_links.justification: "partOf" is a more specific relation that describes a component or member relationship, whereas "is a" is a general classification relation. Therefore, partOf can be considered a subrelation of is a.

relation_hierarchy_links.justification: The relation 'partOf' denotes a component or constituent relationship, which is a more specific form of belonging. Every instance linked by 'partOf' is inherently a member of the larger entity, making 'partOf' a subrelation of the broader 'memberOf' relation. This aligns with the seed ontology context that places partOf under memberOf.

relation_hierarchy_links.justification: The relation 'availableOn' specifies that a media item is accessible through a particular subscription service, which is a more specific instance of the general 'partOf' relation that denotes membership or inclusion within a larger entity. Thus, 'availableOn' can be considered a subrelation of 'partOf'.

evidence.snippet: Skai TV is a Greek free - to - air television network based in Piraeus . It is part of the Skai Group , one of the largest media groups in the country . relation_hierarchy_links.justification: "memberOf" is a specific type of part‑whole relationship where the entity is a member of an organization, which is a special case of the broader "partOf" relation that covers any component or constituent relationship.
